_comment: Photos for the 6 homepage club-stat cards. One row per stat slot — `slot` is the key in the summary `stats` object (worldTitles/europeanTitles/nationalTitles/worldRecords/europeanRecords/nationalRecords). The /achievements/summary route attaches each image to its number via a sibling `statImages` map. `_label` = the user's name for the slot (reference only). imageUrl = user-supplied (2026-05-29). NOTE: the user CONFIRMED the World-record + European-record image picks are intentional even though their filenames read as championship/world photos — store verbatim. imageAlt is agent-composed (English-only for now; folds into the translate pipeline later) — flagged for review. Importer upserts by `slot` (idempotent).

statImages.imageAlt: image for the World Champion titles
image for the European Champion titles
image for the National Champion titles
